name: Lattice Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Refrigerate the sugar cookie dough made from the cookie mix.
2. Freeze the cookie dough for 1 hour, then slice into 1/8-inch slices.
3. Arrange the slices slightly overlapping on the bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch springform pan to form a crust. Seal the edges with floured fingers.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sour cream, sugar, and almond extract. Mix until well blended.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Reserve 1/4 cup of the batter and chill.
7. Pour the remaining batter over the crust.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
9. Increase oven temperature to 450 degrees F.
10. Spoon cherry pie filling over the cheesecake, then pour the reserved batter over the filling to form a lattice design.
11. Bake at 450 degrees F for an additional 10 minutes.
12. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and cool before removing the rim of the pan.
Variation:
Substitute a 13 x 9-inch baking pan for the 9-inch springform pan. Prepare as directed, except bake at 350 degrees F for 40 minutes. Increase oven temperature to 450 degrees F and continue as directed.
